title: Lasso Agentic Purple Teaming
description: Lasso Agentic Purple Teaming combining continuous intelligence attack simulation with automated run-time defense and guardrails. The platform continuously tests LLM-based applications, detects vulnerabilities in real-time, and remediates risks automatically, giving security teams actionable insights without slowing AI deployment.

items: Generate & verify model + agent + tool SBOMs - shared responsibility
